# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a simple GitHub Actions workflow for our application CI. On every push, install dependencies, run unit tests, build the application, and deploy to our staging environment. Focus on speed - we want fast feedback for developers. We'll add security scanning later.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
      - 'feature/**'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_ENV: production
  CI: true

jobs:
  install:
    name: Install Dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: deps-${{ runner.os }}-node20-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            deps-${{ runner.os }}-node20-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ""

      - name: Run allowed postinstall scripts
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm rebuild

  test:
    name: Run Unit Tests
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: deps-${{ runner.os }}-node20-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test -- --coverage --ci --reporters=default
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test

      - name: Upload test coverage
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-report
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 7

  build:
    name: Build Application
    needs: install
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: deps-${{ runner.os }}-node20-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 3
          if-no-files-found: error

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs: [test, build]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify build artifact integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -d "dist" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A dist)" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build artifacts are missing or empty"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build artifacts verified successfully"

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying build artifacts to staging environment..."
          echo "Deployment target: ${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}"
          # Replace with actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # npx serverless deploy --stage staging
          # or: aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ vars.STAGING_BUCKET }} --delete
          # or: az webapp deploy --name ${{ vars.STAGING_APP_NAME }} --src-path dist/
          echo "Deployment completed successfully"
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          echo "Running post-deployment health check..."
          # Replace with actual health check, e.g.:
          # curl --fail --silent --max-time 30 "${{ vars.STAGING_URL }}/health" || exit 1
          echo "Health check passed"
